name: right-way-sql-formatter
description: T-SQL formatter for SSMS-style SQL — format document or selection with configurable rules.

rightWaySqlFormatter.executablePath.description: Path to the SqlFormatter executable. Leave empty to auto-detect from the extension's bundled binary or PATH.

rightWaySqlFormatter.compactRaiserror.description: Keep RAISERROR(...) argument lists on a single line instead of expanding each argument.

rightWaySqlFormatter.compactSingleStatem.description: Render single-statement IF/ELSE/WHILE bodies (no BEGIN/END) on the same line as their control keyword when they fit maxLineWidth.

rightWaySqlFormatter.alignTableJoinsAddA.description: When alignTableJoins is enabled: also add aliases (derived from the table name) to tables that have none.

rightWaySqlFormatter.indentString.description: Indent character to use. 'space' uses spaces (count set by indentSize), 'tab' uses a literal tab character.

rightWaySqlFormatter.indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indent level when indentString is 'space', or tab display width when indentString is 'tab'.

rightWaySqlFormatter.uppercaseKeywords.description: Uppercase SQL keywords (SELECT, FROM, WHERE, etc.).

rightWaySqlFormatter.standardizeKeywords.description: Standardize keyword synonyms (e.g. NATIONAL CHARACTER VARYING → NVARCHAR).

rightWaySqlFormatter.expandCommaLists.description: Expand comma-separated lists onto separate lines.

rightWaySqlFormatter.selectFirstColumnOn.description: When expanding comma lists, break the first SELECT column to a new line instead of keeping it inline with the SELECT keyword.

rightWaySqlFormatter.expandInLists.description: Expand IN (...) lists onto separate lines.

rightWaySqlFormatter.trailingCommas.description: Use trailing commas instead of leading commas.

rightWaySqlFormatter.expandBooleanExpres.description: Expand AND/OR boolean expressions onto separate lines.

rightWaySqlFormatter.expandBetweenCondit.description: Expand BETWEEN ... AND ... onto separate lines.

rightWaySqlFormatter.breakJoinOnSections.description: Break JOIN clauses onto separate lines.

rightWaySqlFormatter.newStatementLineBre.description: Number of blank lines between statements.

rightWaySqlFormatter.newClauseLineBreaks.description: Number of blank lines between clauses.

rightWaySqlFormatter.columnAliasStyle.description: Column alias style: 'as' (col AS alias) or 'equals' (alias = col).

rightWaySqlFormatter.alignColumnDefiniti.description: Align AS keywords vertically in SELECT column list (requires expandCommaLists).

rightWaySqlFormatter.indentJoinOnClause.description: Indent the ON clause an extra level relative to the JOIN keyword.

rightWaySqlFormatter.indentWhereAndOrCon.description: Indent AND/OR conditions in WHERE onto separate lines aligned under the first condition.

rightWaySqlFormatter.alignColumnDefiniti.description: In CREATE TABLE, align column name, data type, nullability, and constraints into vertical columns.

rightWaySqlFormatter.ddlConstraintsOnNew.description: In CREATE TABLE, put each column constraint on its own line.

rightWaySqlFormatter.alignTableJoins.description: Align FROM/JOIN table names, AS aliases, and ON conditions into vertical columns across all joins in a query block.

rightWaySqlFormatter.columnAlwaysHasAlia.description: Ensure every column in a SELECT list has an explicit AS alias. Simple column references use the column name; complex expressions use ColumnAlias_N.

scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run compile
scripts.build:host: npm run build:cli:host && npm run compile
